case_title: CONDORI SERGIO DBA TREBOL TOURS VS SAENZ BLANCA L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY CONDORI SERGIO DBA TREBOL TOURS AS TO DEFENDANT SAENZ BLANCA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
CERT MAIL TO BLANCA L. SAENZ RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONDORI SERGIO DBA TREBOL TOURS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAENZ BLANCA L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
